description: CompositionCharcoal grey and blue striped top with white accents, made of blended cotton fabric, has a V-neck, full sleeves, with ribbed cuffs and hem made of cotton elastane fabricFittingComfortWash careWarm machine wash or hand wash separately in mild detergentDo not bleachDo not wring dryDry in shadeMedium iron, but do not iron on printThis easy-to-wear basic top from jealous 21 adds understated class to your wardrobe. Show off your elegant side in this fashionably tailored top and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with a matching scarf and richly hued denims.Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 5'8' and chest 33"
